chunks.text: Order sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.D-929 of 2021 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Zuhaib Azam, Advocate for respondents No.9,12,&14. Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh ************** According to the learned AAG, the order dated 21.11.2024 has already been complied with; however, on the last date of hearing, counsel for the petitioner was directed to place on record photographs regarding the alleged encroachment over Ali Bahar Wah. Since compliance with the said order has already been made presently no encroachment over the said Wah is reported. Today none present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. It therefore appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the present Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
